entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content:
Let me try to explain some basic facts.

In ABAP we have two levels of metadata definitions:

  • ABAP Dictionary (DDIC)
    The old one. Here you can define global datatypes, classic DDIC database tables and DDIC database views. The tools are transaction SE11 and nowadays ADT. In ADT, a DDIC DDL is used that in the end does the same as transaction SE11. DDIC database tables can have a semantic property called foreign key relationship. The evaluation of that property is done by frameworks such as classic dynpros, classic database locks but not in the ABAP language (ABAP SQL) itself. ABAP SQL knows nothing of foreign keys.
  • ABAP CDS
    The new one. ABAP CDS is still largely based on DDIC. Up to now, you can define some types (but no structures) and CDS entities such as CDS Views, CDS Table Functions, CDS Hierarchies, ... that access DDIC database tables. The relations between CDS entities are modelled by CDS associations that are instantiated as physical joins when accessed in a path expression. It depends on the framework using the CDS entities, if the foreign key relations of the underlying DDIC database tables are considered at all. Up to now there are no CDS table entities available in ABAP CDS. That means, you cannot define an ABAP-managed database table directly with ABAP CDS. Once, this will be available, a concept regarding foreign key relationships between CDS table entities might become available too, probably based on associations then. 

In the tutorial, you were working on a DDIC database table, whose properties are described here:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/index.htm?file=abenddic_database_tables.htm

CDS entities are described here:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/index.htm?file=abencds_entities.htm

And finally, RAP is a programming model based on CDS described here:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/index.htm?file=abenabap_rap.htm

BTP is a SAP product using these technologies. 

ADT is just a tool. It does not make sense to speak about "ADT database tables" or to say "access the ABAP dictionary when developing with ADT". You can edit DDIC objects with ADT and access those in ABAP CDS, ABAP language and with frameworks built with ABAP.

entry.title: Why CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR is not covered in unit test even if executed?
entry.content:
Hi! I just noticed a strange thing.

When I run my unit test I have a picture like this:

 

but if I put break point - it defintely stops there, so class constructor is executed.

Can't it be a bug?

BTW i run in a shared BTP instance, so ABAP version is most recent.

Thanks!

Regards,

Isobel.

entry.title: How can I get full logs of Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear BTP experts,

I'm currently using CF CLI command "cf logs" to get an application log. The log output command "cf logs" of the CF command, but I am not sure whether it can or cannot log for a specified time or period of time.

The option '--recent' is also not clear as to which period of time can be logged.

Therefore, can anyone tell me how long the logging period is when the command is executed?

Hi,

Reference picture settings or check SAP Notes 2447563 , there are more settings

entry.title: Transaction MB** updated in Goods Movement document in S/4 HANA system
entry.content:
Goods Movement posted with inbound Interface, system updated Transaction code as MB** in S/4 HANA system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transaction MB** updated in Goods Movement document i...
entry.content:
The old MB transactions are replaced by MIGO.

The entries in table 158G are program-internal keys, which are in place, even the MB transactions are not used any more.

From standard system design, though the MB** updated as Transaction code, the IDOC and BAPI_GOODMVT_CREATE do not call any MB transaction, this is just an internal naming.

For further details, check in the following SAP KBA 2304535 - BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE - GMCODE for MIGO in table T158G.

entry.title: Re: My Tips for Migrating very old Fiori Apps to BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Spectacular Blog @AlessandroSpadoni  !

This is pure gold!

Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi SAP Community!

entry.title: Asset depreciation revaluation difference
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am facing an issue with depreciation amounts for an asset. Need your guidance at earliest.

My client purchased an asset on 30.06.2022 for a value of 119663.67 and they are following SLM method with useful life of 10 years. The ordinary depreciation will be 997.20(119663.67/10*12). Business revaluated the asset and revaluation posted to asset with 10336.33 on 01.07.2022. They are following fiscal year July-June(V6).

When the business performs depreciation for the asset, they are getting 86.14 difference.

Below i am attaching the screen snaps of AW01N for reference. Please check and let me know, how the system is calculating the depreciation with difference.

Thanks,

Pruthvi Raj

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.

Hello,

 

unfortunately for us this still gives the error on terminal prompt if we execute cds watch.

cds watch output is as below-


node:events:496
throw er; // Unhandled 'error' event
^

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, stat '/home/user/projects/zdecisionpkg/node_modules/@types/sap__cds'
at statSync (node:fs:1659:25)
at #watchFile (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:152:28)
at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:129:26)
at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
at [kFSWatchStart] (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:200:26)
at Object.watch (node:fs:2461:36)
at tryWatch (/managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/watch.js:131:15)
at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/watch.js:412:19
at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/has-native-recursive.js:110:9
Emitted 'error' event on Watcher instance at:
at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/watch.js:134:15
at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:77:11) {
errno: -2,
code: 'ENOENT',
syscall: 'stat',
path: '/home/user/projects/zdecisionpkg/node_modules/@types/sap__cds',
filename: '/home/user/projects/zdecisionpkg'
}

Node.js v20.12.0

 

Experts -please advise.

Regards,

Saritha

Could you please anyone can help

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate – What’s New in User Experience guidance with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Thanks Paul - sweet of you!

entry.title: Re: Email Triggering for Maintenace Notification in S4 Ha...
entry.content: When Production Team Create Maintenance Notifications, That time Mail should be received by maintenance team on the basis of Main Work center. For Example - If Main work center is Mechanical( which is maintained in Equipment Master data) then mail should be received by mechanical team. If Main work center is Electrical( Which is maintained in Equipment Master data) then mail should be received by Electrical team.

entry.title: Re: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content:
Hi Ramin,

App-to-app navigation links are controlled by authorizations. If you are seeing too many links you have too much authorization.  

You only see links if you have the authorization to launch the app listed in the link. 

I strongly recommend to all customers that they have proper test users with realistic authorizations. This saves a lot of misunderstandings and unnecessary work. 

You can generate test users from SAP Business Roles using task list SAP_FIORI_CONTENT_ACTIVATION. 

Best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC with quantity conversion
entry.content: Thanks Martin,

entry.title: Customized rating field in the performance form
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We need assistance with our Performance forms. We have a requirement to implement a custom calculation for each goal, where goal achievement is calculated as (item rating * item weight) / 100. We're unsure how to set up this custom calculation within the performance form. If anyone has experience with this or can guide us on how to achieve these calculations for each goal, your help or any relevant KBA would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC with quantity conversion
entry.content: We have done the necessary changes, but still we have a problem. [09:51] Kortman, Lauret Result before changing delivery unit 2x B = 1x A Result after changing delivery unit While there is enough stock on A and according to the substitution A should be picked, now there is always one B instead of round A when you would normally get an comma. Here you would expect 1 A instead of 0,5 A but you suddenly get B This one is still going correct Here the same issue, you would expect 81 A instead of 80,5 A but you get 80 A and 1 B

entry.title: Re: How to restrict Customer records from being replicated from SAP ECC to ARIBA SLP
entry.content:
Hi,

what happens if a BP is a customer and a vendor at the same time?
you need to define a object filter in DRFF. Only if a Vendor role is assign you should replicate the object

 

BR

entry.title: Re: Recalculating Time accruals based on Seniority and FTE using Off Cycle Event Rule
entry.content: @NeeleshKamath - Thank you so much for this solution. I tried the same rule based on the change of FTE field on Job information field but the recalculation didn't trigger. Any inputs on that.

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content:
Hi Teja

To separate the inboxes, you need to create a Scenario Variant for My Inbox.

This will let you have 2 separate tiles - each with a parameter that points to a different Scenario Variant - that appear to separate the work for users. 

Refer to the App Documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/2cf02513a2d8471ab81eab6251abe0d4.html

Underneath it is all My Inbox so all work items are there.

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content: Hi Archer, the two roles defined for My Inbox tile, should be included in the 'user role' property of system aliases? Isn't it that we create role in both systems and assign it to CRM system alias as per the note mentioned above.?

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Recalculating Time accruals based on Seniority and FTE using Off Cycle Event Rule
entry.content:
@abhawsar1 - Please check

1. if FTE is added as a recalculation field in Time Account type

2. Check Time management configuration object settings in manage data: Recalculation should be enabled as "Yes" and set to always /immediate

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content: Hi Jocelyn, In our case, will this work because we have two separate backend systems?

entry.title: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard
entry.content:
Hello,

I have asked this question in the Beginner Corner Discussions Group (Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard) and was suggested to post it here as well.

I am doing the lesson Generating the list report – object page app of the course Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps. I don't know how to complete the Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard in VSCode under Windows 11.

In the video, he says: "For this demo, I have already saved a system that I will use". How should I save the system? In the first week's exercises, I've used Eclipse and had to provide a URL and log in with my trial account to get the project. Should I do something similar in VSCode?

I've googled how to get files from a project opened in Eclipse (under Windows 11). I've found the project location, but there are no files like the ones I see in Eclipse, just some references. So, I assume, this is not how I get the system.

In the exercises Git repository, they say: "We will choose the travel OData V4 service that you created in week 1, unit 5 as part of the OData creation exercise". Unlike the screenshots in the repository, I am not getting "ABAP Environment on SAP Business Technology Platform" as an option for "System". Instead, there is an option called "New":

When I select this, I can select "ABAP Environment on SAP Business Technology Platform" as a "System Type". Then, I am prompted to provide an "ABAP environment definition source":

I select "Upload a Service Key File". Unlike the workflow assumed in the repository, I don't get a list of services. And I don't know where to get the service key file from. How is VSCode supposed to know about the services?

Best regards,
Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: Sales Analysis - SAP HANA Dashboard is empty, even though it is active.
entry.content:
Hello All

Does anyone know how to resolve the issue with a blank Dashboard. It is all the SAP HANA dashboards, all are active and the company is initiliased for analytics.

 

We are on SAP Business One for HANA version 10.

 

thanks

JAnice

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content: Hi Teja, Yes, user role can be assigned to a system alias. But I`m not the expert in roles, I`m not sure what is the role difference between hub system and backend system. so maybe you can try to create to create role in both backend system.

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard
entry.content:
Thanks for the suggestion @David_Chaviano. 

I have posted the question in Technology Q&A as well.

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: CSV attachment gets generated with no content while sending it via mail adapter in SAP CPI

Hi,

Currently, I am sending an error email notification with the CSV attachment. The attachment gets generated with no content. Can anyone please help me to resolve this issue. 

Regards,

Carol

entry.title: Receiving valuated stock in transit is not updating in MMBE.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently working on an ECC to S/4HANA migration project and encountering an issue with the update of receiving valuated stock in transit quantity in MMBE.

In ECC, once the 107 mvnt type is posted, in MMBE the stock is updated separately in 'Receiving Valuated Stock in Transit'. However, after the migration to S/4HANA, posting the 107 mvnt type does not update the 'Receiving Valuated Stock in Transit' field; instead, the stock appears in 'On-Order Stock'. When I complete the 109 mvnt type, the stock is deducted from 'On-Order Stock' and updated in 'Unrestricted Stock'. The expected behavior is for the stock to update in 'Receiving Valuated Stock in Transit' after performing the PGI of the 107 mvnt type.

Interestingly, in both systems, the MB5OA transaction code works correctly, reflecting the stock updates after posting.

 

I have attached some screenshots for reference. Your valuable inputs will help to resolve this issue.

MM (Materials Management) #ECC2S4HANA

entry.title: SAP Enable Now/Companion Server Certificate Renewal from Basis End #ATR
entry.content:
#ATR (21)

Informative Note:

  • Created this blog to provide information on how to renew/apply SAP Enable Now Certificate from Basis End.
  • SAP Enable now (Author/Consumption) Edition / Companion will be used/connected usually in S/4 HANA Systems where business users use and create own contents/Edit SAP Standard Contents.

  • If SAP Enable now Manager/WorkArea Connected to SAP System, Both SAP System and Enable now should have Valid Certificate to secure HTTPS SSL Say Fiori Launchpad.
  • If SAP Enable now certificate expired, it will show “Not Secure – SSL” link even though SAP System certificate valid/Ignore to connect Enable Now WorkArea.
  • It will also lead to multiple unnecessary logons/improper updates/SSL Connection issues if SAP System runs with SSL.

  • In SAP System, it will be SAPSSL*.PSE file generation. We will use import command and create/generate PSE files with our Trusted CA Certificates itself which created and downloaded from SAP MMC.
  • For Enable Now, we can directly use PFX/P12 Certificate itself for SSL Connection.

Usual Procedure:

  • Using Keytool, we can able to create keystore (JKS) with own private key/alias which asks to fill information while creating keystore.
  • You can also convert JKS to P12 (Optional)
  • Once Java keystore private key created, we can generate Certificate Signing request for that private key and get CA response (Certificate root, server, intermediate signed by CA)
  • Once CA approved certificate received, we can renew/apply/overwrite certificate to our Keystore.
  • You can ignore this blog if you are seeking usual procedure - CSR request method.
  • Usually, it won’t be allowed in most of the Organizations to approve own certificate.
  • Valid Server Certificate (Matching CN as Server Name – PCKS12 – PFX/P12) should be issued by Security Team/Generate manually from SAP MMC.
  • We need to use the same and make Enable now to pick Keystore certificate for SSL like SAP.

SAP MMC Certificate Renewal Steps:

  • Request a new certificate in SAP MMC and download PFX File.
  • Unlike SAP, we don’t need separate server, root and intermediate certificate itself if you have PFX file.
  • Tomcat supports PFX/P12 Extensions. We can use our PFX File directly. SAP Enable Now will pick the same for SSL Connections.

  • Downloaded as “EnableNowCertificatePFX.pfx”.

With Private Key and Certificates:

  • In case if you have received Signed Server Certificate and Private Key separately from Security team (Base-64 Encoded Format X.509 CER – Readable Format/PEM), You can use OpenSSL and create P12/PFX file by using it.

  • OpenSSL will be open-source software. You can surf in web and download.
  • Create Single text file by placing certificates in order Server -> Issuer -> Root Certificates.

  • Command: openssl pkcs12 -export -in Certificate.txt -inkey PrivateKeyFile.key -name EnableNowCertificate -out EnableNowCert.p12
  • It will generate an EnableNowCert.P12 Keystore file which will have Private entry and Certificates under alias EnableNowCertificate.

  • Check Keystore certificate list via Java Keytool.
  • You can use any Java versions - JRE/JDK/SAPJVM since we are going to check certificate list only.

  • Private Key with Certificates exist in Keystore as expected.

  • We can use our created P12 Keystore for Tomcat – Enable Now SSL Connection.

Tomcat: Making PFX/P12 Keystore file for SAP Enable Now SSL Connection

  • You can paste our downloaded PFX/P12 file in any path whichever tomcat access available.
  • Mine -> C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_311\bin

  • Now, Edit server file and make tomcat to choose our created keystore for certificate authentication. It will be used automatically for Enable Now as well.
  • No need to use any predefined protocols APJ APR.
  • Simply added below entries after HTTP and it will work fine. Make sure you are giving right keystore file and password.
  • C:\Program Files\Apache Software Foundation\Tomcat 8.5\conf/server.xml
  • I have crosschecked with both certificates.

*Restart Tomcat to take effect*

 

Check SSL Connection – SAP Enable Now:

  •  SSL Connection fine now.

 

  • With EnableNowCert.p12 -> July 17, 2024 – August 16, 2025

 

  • With EnableNowCertificatePFX.pfx -> July 19, 2024 – August 18, 2025

 

Check SAP System Fiori Launchpad:

  • Connecting to SAP Enable Now

  • Connection is secure now.

 

  • We have successfully renewed SAP Enable Now Certificate.

 

WANNA KNOW MORE ABOUT SSL CONFIGURATION ON ABAP AND HANA?

PLEASE REFER BELOW BLOG

MANUAL SAP SSL CONFIGURATION FOR S/4 HANA (ABAP AND HANA) SYSTEM from OS_LEVEL #ATR

Thanks for Visiting!

Please do connect and follow my Linked In Profile - https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajaytr66/

#ATR SAP Blogs

entry.title: Re: Updating LIPS Custom Fields In Outbound Delivery Usin...
entry.content:
Well,
after taking a deeper look into it, I found this

since non of the standard values change the system will not call the BAdI's (LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC) following methods:

- CHANGE_DELIVERY_HEADER
- CHANGE_DELIVERY_ITEM

but will call SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE,
and what I did notice is that the system sets the update indicator to being empty instead of 'U' that will ultimately trigger an update i.e. XLIPS-UPDKZ = 'U' and/or XLIKP-UPDKZ = 'U', the one relevant for you depends whether you need changes in delivery header and/or items.

when you set these values to 'U' the values that you extracted from the 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE' on BAdI 'SMOD_V50B0001' will be saved.

is it also possible to retrieve the operation long text from the S4H system to DMC via CPI with this custom enhancement?

Regards Gizem

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content: cds watch seems to be working for me, but the mta build is still failing for the same reason

entry.title: Re: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content:
Hi, Pumimab

The PA to be visible in table V_T001P_N you have to create  a subarea for this PA folowing thi IMG in capture below :

hope it's help.

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content: Hi Teja, From what you have described you are setting up ONE My Inbox in your ERP system with 2 system aliases to integrate the tasks from 2 different systems in to the TASKPROCESSING service. So all work items are in ONE inbox. Scenario-specific tiles separate the work items visually based on task ids. Each system will have its own task ids. So yes this works. I'd suggest you just focus first on getting all the work items into one inbox, and worry about configuring the scenario-specific tiles later. .

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST RF05A-NEWKO Mapping
entry.content: GL_ACCOUNT is the account number. NEWKO is in the online transaction used to hold all types of accounts (Vendor, Customer, GL etc)

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST RF05A-NEWKO Mapping
entry.content:
Sorry something is going wrong when doing comment on iPad…

but: newko is used to hold multiple account types (Customer, Vendor, GL etc). In the bapi you need to separate, so gl goes in the ACCOUNTGL table and vendor in VENDOR table.

entry.title: Re: LLM Fine-tuning
entry.content:
Thank you for the article, it is very interesting and promising!

The coding experience with AI code editors (like Cursor with the model Claude 3.5 Sonnet) is really great when working with JavaScript or Python.
If we can have a similar experience with ABAP, it will have a huge impact on development speed and efficiency.

For information, I checked the S/4HANA 2023 version and indeed, there is this new parameter ER_DATA for the method CONTAINS.

I asked Claude 3.5 Sonnet to apply best practices to the code and the result looks really great.
System Prompt:
You are an expert in ABAP Clean Code and you refactor the provided code using the latest best practices
User Prompt:

READ TABLE mt_entries WIT KEY key = iv_key
REFERENCE INTO DATA(lr_entry).
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  ev_found = abap_true.
  er_data = lr_entry->data.
ELSE.
  ev_found = abap_false.
ENDIF.


Model response:
Here's a refactored version of the code using ABAP Clean Code principles:

METHOD read_entry.
  TRY.
      DATA(lr_entry) = REF #( mt_entries[ key = iv_key ] ).
      ev_found = abap_true.
      er_data  = lr_entry->data.
    CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
      ev_found = abap_false.
      CLEAR er_data.
  ENDTRY.
ENDMETHOD.

Explanation of the changes:
1. Used a method structure with meaningful name `read_entry` to encapsulate the logic.
2. Replaced the `READ TABLE` statement with the more modern and concise table expression `mt_entries[ key = iv_key ]`.
3. Utilized the `TRY-CATCH` block to handle the case when the entry is not found, which is cleaner than checking `sy-subrc`.
4. Used inline declaration for `lr_entry` with `REF #( )` to directly get a reference to the table entry.
5. Set `ev_found` to `abap_true` only when the entry is found, and `abap_false` in the `CATCH` block when it's not found.
6. Added `CLEAR er_data` in the `CATCH` block to ensure `er_data` is empty when the entry is not found.
7. Removed the `IF-ELSE` structure, making the code more straightforward and reducing nesting. This refactored version is more readable, uses modern ABAP syntax, and follows clean code principles by making the intent clearer and reducing the complexity of the code.


Max

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Workflow Instance from a SAPUI5 Application developed in a Multitarget Application
entry.content:
hey @MajoMartinez 

thank you very much for sharing this great guide! I'm trying to set up a workflow using an existing UI5 app which is deployed to "HTML5 Applications" (Managed Approuter) of my cf space already. It is required that the mta project for the workflow module and for the mta project for ui5 app are different projects as they do have a different lifecycle. Is there any document which describes the steps how to integrate an existing UI5 app to use it as custom UI5 App to render task details?

The app is build for that usage already, we migrate from NEO to CF 🙂

 

Best
Alex

entry.title: Re: Need to set system status to inactive in LMDB
entry.content: Hello Kishan,

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - Learning-Landscape S4D43...
entry.content: Hi Krisztina, our colleagues told me that today we had a general unavailability of the system booking process. They also told me that the issue is fixed. Please try again.

entry.title: Re: Need to set system status to inactive in LMDB
entry.content: Thanks Kishan My Solman system is SoLMAN 7.2 SPS17, and currently, the Managed system is configured only for CHARM. Is the following step sufficient for the patch upgrade in Managed system? In LMDB: Select the Managed system. Navigate to the Attributes tab. Change the Lifecycle status from undefined to inactive.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Plus - Hyderabad
entry.content: @Ruthvik_Chowdary It seems that the registration window is closed. Some of my colleagues are not able to register as the window shows "Sold Out"

entry.title: External Commission Settlement of Invoices created directly from sales orders prior to delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

        We want to use condition contracts for payment of external commissions using condition contract technique to dealers. Business requirement mandates that no settlement should be done (accrual or actual payment) unless a delivery has been created. For sales from stock products we do not have an issue as billing always takes place post delivery. But for custom make to orders, we have order related billing and billing document is created much ahead of the delivery. However, since condition contract settlement gets triggered by billing, system doesnt check if the delivery for the custom order has been made or not. Is there any way to achieve this technically? I have looked for a BADI under Settlement process which allows us to cancel the settlement run for an entire contract if one of the invoices in the business volume is found to be without any delivery. But customer doesnt want this to happen- we need to skip only that particular invoice and settle the commissions for the remaining invoices where delivery has been made for the custom orders.

Please share your opinion on how we can achieve this - specifically, if there is any BADI which allows us the scope to remove the invoices (without delivery) from the business volume for calculating the settlement amount.

Thanks

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Plus - Hyderabad
entry.content:
@sanilbhandari As this is Stammtisch the format is to host with lesser people only 10-25 people is the max for this event. That's why we are doing Stammtisch plus with 50 ppl due to demand.

SAP inside track will be the event with max people & big, its planned very soon.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI to Microsoft SharePoint Adapter Integration
entry.content:
I notice, like amazon adapter too, there is no implementation with Poll Enrich to get a file inside a flow.

There is some future update with this feature?

entry.title: Re: Connect to External Data Sources with SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi Yuval, thanks for your post! It is still helpful after all this time. 🙂

My current mistake was: I did some misconfiguration on the cloud connector side when I configured my paths and set the access policy to “Path only” (this means that the path needs to match 100% and subpaths are not taking into account). Now, since the "/" setting was changed to "Path and all Sub-Paths", my connectivity problem is gone. 

Maybe this is relevant for other BTP developers.

Best regards,

Franzi

entry.title: Schedule job that run to move balances from one GL account to another
entry.content:
Hi experts

Is there any job that run to move balances from one GL account to another GL account

Kindly please share your thoughts

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: integration with subcontracting cockpit app, for goods issue
entry.content:
We need to generate an integration in sap public cloud, for our customer, with which we can make the goods issues for subcontracting orders.

I can't find a way to associate the creation of the goods issue to the subcontracting order with the subcontracting cockpit app.

Best regards, thank you in advance

entry.title: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,


Is it possible to have Data Access Control for data from model on SAC with same approach as we have in Datasphere? Model on SAC is with imported data not via live connection.


I have concept of authorization based on dimensions with so many values and there is so many users. For example, each Project Manager should see data only for one or more Projects, but dimension Project has over 5000 values and it's not possible to maintain it manually like on the screenshot below.

And this is not only issue, but many Users have more than one dimension that his authorizations are based on. Is it possible to implement this concept of data access control in SAC? Below is preview of authorization concept from Datasphere.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Is there any way to check the where used list of a BEx Query?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there any way to check the where used list of a BEx Query?

Thanks,

Kalyan

entry.title: Total Comp Publishing
entry.content:
We are using one Total Comp template. During publishing, we are excluding some employees from merit publishing but want their bonus (variable pay) to be published. issue is if the merit publish fails then bonus publish will also fail.

Any possible solutions for this problem?

entry.title: Re: Running ABAW Error Msg. AA629
entry.content: hello, thank you for your reply

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Native Storage Extension (NSE) capabilities – Key Findings
entry.content:
• NSE’s potential to offload data can range from 1/10th to one-third of data or more. However, wrong partitioning design or wrong candidate selection for NSE could lead to frequent page-loads and performance issues.

performance issue will happen to  wrong candidate only right ? Not for entire HANA system?

entry.title: Chào người dùng SAP tại Việt Nam! (Attention SAP users in Vietnam!)
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'd like to hear from our users based in Vietnam, particularly those frequently visiting the SAP Community Beginner's Corner. You are an invaluable part of our international community, and we would love to learn more about your journey with SAP.


We encourage you to share your story with us. We are interested in knowing:

  • How you came across SAP
  • Why you decided to start learning SAP
  • How these skills have opened doors to opportunities within Vietnam.

We are also offering an exciting opportunity for someone from Vietnam to join us on the SAP Learning Insights podcast to share your experiences, insights, and knowledge with our global audience; helping others gain from your wisdom and examples.


I can't wait to hear from you in the comments. If you feel more comfortable responding in Vietnamese, feel free!  (Tôi sẽ cố gắng hết sức để sử dụng phiên dịch 😄)


Chào mừng cộng đồng SAP!


Tôi rất vui mừng khi thông báo rằng chúng tôi rất mong muốn nghe từ người dùng của chúng tôi tại Việt Nam, đặc biệt là những người thường xuyên ghé thăm SAP Community Beginner's Corner. Các bạn là một phần không thể thiếu của cộng đồng quốc tế của chúng tôi và chúng tôi rất muốn tìm hiểu thêm về hành trình của bạn với SAP.


Chúng tôi khuyến khích bạn chia sẻ câu chuyện của mình với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi quan tâm đến việc bạn biết đến SAP như thế nào, tại sao bạn quyết định bắt đầu tìm hiểu về nó và những kỹ năng mà bạn đã học được đã mở ra những cơ hội nào trong bối cảnh Việt Nam.


Hơn nữa, chúng tôi cũng đang cung cấp một cơ hội thú vị cho một người đến từ Việt Nam tham gia podcast SAP Learning Insights của chúng tôi. Chia sẻ kinh nghiệm, hiểu biết và kiến thức của bạn với khán giả trên toàn thế giới, giúp người khác học hỏi từ trí tuệ và ví dụ của bạn.


Không thể đợi được nghe từ bạn trong phần bình luận. Nếu bạn cảm thấy thoải mái hơn khi phản hồi bằng tiếng Việt, hãy thoải mái! (Tôi sẽ cố gắng hết sức để sử dụng phiên dịch 😄)

entry.title: Re: ODATA : how to convert iv_filter_string to lt_select_options
entry.content: Where is h_request_context? In the method sign I have IO_TECH_REQUEST_CONTEXT but get_filter_select_options returns empty table

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Managing app lifecycle impacts on users
entry.content:
Hi Christophe

I just did a quick run of the numbers, and in practice of the more than 15K apps/UIs available in SAP S/4HANA we have made deprecated/obsolete just over 300 since SAP S/4HANA 1511 - which is less than 2.5% of all apps.  

Making an app deprecated is a serious decision taken by the App Owner largely based on direct customer feedback on the original app. Customer feedback comes in via a number of channels including Customer Influence, Customer Engagement Initiatives, Early Adopter Care programs, SAP Incidents, and more. 

We only do this where the new app provides significant new benefits - such as new features, better navigation, more consistent behaviour, supports an improved business process, new extension options, new options to pre-set defaults for users, etc. 

These new features cannot always be retrofitted to an existing app.  So there are times when we need to move to a new UI design, such as a new floorplan, to achieve those business benefits.  In many cases the successor app is released in advance of deprecation as a way to verify that the new app is working well for customers, before we deprecate the old app

The process of deprecating before making an app obsolete supports both business users and administrators as they transition from an older app to its successor.  Remember while the app is deprecated it is still commercially supported - we are just giving you fair notice that the app will be removed in a later release so you should start moving to the successor as soon as possible. 

The App Documentation of the old app should indicate that it has been deprecated and the recommended successor.  The App Documentation of the new app should state it's benefits. For example you can see this for app Manage Journal Entries (original version) versus Manage Journal Entries (New Version) in the current help for SAP S/4HANA 2023.  Be aware that this is an evolving journey - in earlier releases sometimes reasons were stated in the Simplification Items or in SAP Notes.

We are always looking for new ways to help users transition - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2408 will introduce a User Experience Switch to highlight the new versus old app and encourage users to try the new app. 

P.s. Re Journal Entry Analyzer ...  I'm not entirely sure what happened on your project... we did deliberately make the "old" and "new" Journal Entry Analyzer apps available in parallel in earlier SAP S/4HANA releases, so that users could transition between them. Users should have been able to compare old to new when moving their personalizations.  In fact, we made the old apps available as parallel alternatives to the new design studio apps deliberately as there were a couple of features Design Studio did not support (e.g. printing). In the end in this case the "old" apps won out as Design Studio was deprecated and then made obsolete - kind of the exception that proves the rule! I can only guess that someone was perhaps a little over zealous in locking users out of the alternatives?  For the announcements refer to SAP Notes

  • 3133221 - S4TWL - Deprecation of Design Studio Apps
  • 3112220 - FAQ: Web Dynpro Apps and Design Studio Apps in SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

And for reasons refer to blog "Six reasons why Web Dynpro is better than Design Studio in SAP S/4HANA Cloud"

entry.title: Automated email on PO Addition in SAP B1
entry.content:
Is there a way to automate an email with the PO layout attached whenever a PO has been added in SAP.

Currently only manually through SAP B1 Mailer, the same can shared across

entry.title: Re: Default company code no longer set automatically in s...
entry.content: I have the same problem, how did you solve it?

entry.title: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content:
Hi experts,

one of our customers faces an issue with one OData request, but I can't figure out the cause, because no error message is displayed in the response, and there are no entries in the /IWFND/ERROR_LOG or ST22.

The request is a simple GET request of an EntitySet. It happens only once if the user opens the application the first time of the browser session. There are several requests before that error request which are all successful. After a page refresh the error no longer occurs. 

This is the response of the request:

This is the request 

The customer is using a S/4HANA system and it only occurs on the test system, not the productive system.

Do you have any idea what could be causing the problem or how I can find out the exact cause?

 

Thanks in advance

Julia

entry.title: Running AFBN Error Msg. AU008
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have defined a real depreciation area and customized OABD, OABC and OAYZ as below screenshot and after that when I try AFBN it says "Define depreciation area correctly" I saw AU008. Can anyone help me?

 

 

Thank you,

Gokhan

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC with quantity conversion
entry.content:
If I understand it correctly, the requested quantity is 80,5.

In ATP there is currently no rounding up. Can you set up the regular SD rounding on item type to round the reuqested quantity to 81? Then it should be fine.

-People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 

-First generation student

Thank you, looking forward to hear from you.

entry.title: Re: Client Certificate authentication for API calls
entry.content: Were you able to find an answer for this? I have a similar requirement where I want to authenticate the the third party application calling the API proxy using certificate authentication. Do you know what config needs to be done in the BTP?

entry.title: Posting partial retirement without revenue to asset with expired useful life
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have situation where our finance department wants to post 'Partial retirement without revenue (Scrapping)' to an asset whose useful life is expired and is at 5% salvage value. The issue is that they want the difference between Partial Gross Block (the amount being retired) and Cumulative Depreciation account to post to a Loss account (P&L). System, however is posting the difference to Cumulative Depreciation account only. For active assets with remaining useful life, the difference is getting posted to Loss Account only.

Can you help?

Note:

  1. The setting in AO90 is properly maintained against the specific account determination, i.e. proper GL account is maintained in field KTREST - 'Loss Made on Asset Retirement w/o Reven.' 
  2. 'Neg. Vals Allowed' tick is checked in the specific depreciation area (01- Book depreciation) of the asset master.

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
proper authorization setup for SAC import model would involve creating Teams, assigning users to those teams (e.g. done automatically through connection with AD groups), and assigning teams to relevant projects.
But in your case, I would consider loading the Read and Write columns directly with user IDs from the Datasphere view to SAC dimension through oData connection.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with ABAP: How to Create Database View Part 2
entry.content:
Hello!

Regarding ZAK_DEP, how the entries are inserted?

Table Content -> Create Entries is disabled.

Marjan

entry.title: Attachment mandatory for particular business users only
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In C4C sales, can we make attachment mandatory in opportunity for some business users only?

I have made attachment tab mandatory in sales -- Opportunity for sales emp. and sales manager but now i want to make that non-mandatory for rest of the business users. Caw we do that in C4C? If yes, please suggest step.

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Re: Translation of customer-HCM-infotype
entry.content:
Hi.
I know it is 11 years, but today I face to same issue and solution is easy. Run report RSLANG20. Warning: report run is time consuming. When report finished translations works...

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
It's been updated now, it works.

Please note the following.

I deleted the gen and node_modules folders, and then executed 'npm update' command, after which i could build and deploy the project.

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC with quantity conversion
entry.content: I have already used a rounding up to 1 in the material master data, so that it should be rounded up to integers

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
It's been updated now, it works.

Please note the following.

I deleted the gen and node_modules folders, and then executed 'npm update' command, after which i could build and deploy the project.

entry.title: Re: How to implement Value-Help in Input-Field for RAP OD...
entry.content:
Thank you for your Anwer @ArcherZhang you helped me to get further.
I tested around with FPM and Macros Fields and unfortunately there is a problem with the value help. When i select a value from the value help, it just shows for a split second in the input field and then gets deleted again. I tested the same thing on Macros Table with and there the valuehelp inside the input fields work fine. Do you know how i can fix this problem?

entry.title: Re: automation not getting executed despite unattended mode of bot and environment assignment to bot
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

please make sure the agent has been added to the environment. The agent should be in unattended mode and connected and should also show up in the agent management section in the control tower. If you haven't done so, please also try to remove the attribute and try without it to verify if the attribute has been properly defined. 

Best, Natascha

entry.title: Re: How to find the draft Blog in sap community
entry.content: I agree, that would be nice to have it in My Content, because the section "Autosaved drafts" (only for questions/answers) already exist there (need to scroll a little bit).

entry.title: Re: Create DataType and Message Type artifact in Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Sui
entry.content:
Hi Philippe,

Generation of ABAP proxies is still not supported in SAP Integration Suite. It is part of our roadmap and the idea is to have SAP Cloud Integration serve as ES Repository for the ABAP system.

Regards,

Radhika

entry.title: 🚀 **Unlock the Power of Dynamic Attributes in SAP Commerce Cloud - Must-Watch Video!** 🚀
entry.content:
We bring you a specially curated video tutorial that dives deep into the concept of dynamic attributes and how to effectively apply them in real-world scenarios. 

🎥 **[Watch the Video Here!](https://microlearning.opensap.com/media/Applying%20Dynamic%20Attributes%20in%20SAP%20Commerce%20Cloud/1_svqhb79z)** 🎥

This video is designed for everyone, from beginners to seasoned developers. Whether you declare attributes regularly or encounter them sporadically, this tutorial expands your knowledge and provide practical applications to improve your work within the SAP Commerce Cloud environment.

### **What You Will Learn:**
- **Basics of Dynamic Attributes:** Understand the theory behind dynamic attributes and their important role.
- **Step-by-Step Implementation:** Follow a detailed guide on implementing a `DynamicAttributeHandler` implementation class.
- **Practical Examples:** Dive into examples like managing years of experience for a trainer and setting up localized dynamic attributes.
- **Pro Insights and Best Practices:** Learn from the pros with recommended naming conventions, minimizing overhead, handling complex logic, and much more.

### **Why Should You Watch?**
- **Boost Efficiency:** Streamline your processes by mastering dynamic attributes.
- **Best Practices:** Ensure your coding methods are up-to-date with the latest recommendations.
- **Expert Knowledge:** Learn from precise and informative demonstrations that cover a wide spectrum of use cases.

### **Engage with the Content:**
- **Pause and Implement:** Try out the techniques as you learn to ensure understanding and retention.
- **Take Notes:** Highlight the best practices and tips that resonate with your work.
- **Join the Discussion:** Comment with your experiences, questions, or other tips you’ve discovered!

### **Ready to Transform Your Skills?**
Dynamic attributes are potent tools in the SAP Commerce Cloud’s arsenal. Whether it’s making your API more efficient or handling complex logic effortlessly, the applications are vast and varied. Don’t miss out on learning these invaluable skills. Click the following link and supercharge your knowledge today!

👉 **[Discover Dynamic Attributes Now!](https://microlearning.opensap.com/media/Applying%20Dynamic%20Attributes%20in%20SAP%20Commerce%20Cloud

entry.title: Re: S/4 Migration Cockpit and Vendor phone extension
entry.content: Guess this will work only for one phone number extension. As there are additional phone 1 & Additional phone2 if you create 3 fields for 3 extension example ZTELEXT1, ZTELEXT2 & ZTELEXT3 , there is no scope to mapp all these 3 to target as target has only 1 extension filed. After migration observeD 1st ZTELEXT1 value is copied to other 2.
